comment: 32yo woman, mother diagnosed with breast cancer at 38, maternal aunt with high-grade serous ovarian cancer at 52, Ashkenazi-Jewish ancestry. Patient herself untested, no current cancer. Engine routes to PreventionPlan: standard = pre-test counseling + germline BRCA1/2 + extended-panel (PALB2/CHEK2/ATM/RAD51C/D) testing; alternative = empirical enhanced surveillance (breast MRI q1y from 25-30, alternating with mammogram from 30). Validates v0.2-B BRCA/HBOC hereditary pilot.
